title: Autom8 Leads Schema
description: Schema for the Leads tab in the Autom8 Google Sheets CRM. One row per lead.

linkedin_url.description: Public LinkedIn profile URL. Leave blank if unknown.

instagram_url.description: Public Instagram profile URL. Leave blank if unknown.

email.description: Email address only if publicly listed. Never invent or purchase.

source.example: LinkedIn search: SaaS founder Instagram automation

one_sentence_brief.description: One sentence describing what this person does

content_style.description: How they use content: educational, product-led, lifestyle, community, etc.

audience_type.description: Who follows or buys from them

customer_acquisition_style.description: How they acquire customers: organic, paid, community, referral, content-led

operational_bottleneck_guess.description: What operational challenge they likely face based on public signals

brand_positioning_summary.description: How they position themselves in the market

engagement_signals.description: Observable public engagement signals: comment volume, reply threads, saves

buying_intent_signals.description: Any visible signals that they are actively looking for solutions

fit_score.description: How closely this lead matches Autom8's ICP (1–10)

timing_score.description: How timely or ready this lead appears to be (1–10)

lead_temperature_reasoning.description: One sentence explaining the temperature rating

autom8_angle.description: Which Autom8 feature is most relevant for this lead

suggested_first_message_angle.description: Which pain point or use case to lead with in outreach

recommended_action.description: What should happen next with this lead

date_contacted.description: Date of first outreach message sent

assigned_to.description: Team member handling this lead (if applicable)

sample_row.name: Jordan Mills
sample_row.source: LinkedIn search: SaaS founder Instagram automation
sample_row.one_sentence_brief: SaaS founder building no-code tools using Instagram as primary signup acquisition channel.
sample_row.customer_acquisition_style: Content-led organic via Instagram and LinkedIn
sample_row.operational_bottleneck_guess: Manually responding to comments and DMs, losing leads in the noise
sample_row.brand_positioning_summary: Founder-led no-code tools brand with heavy personal brand
sample_row.engagement_signals: Posts regularly get 50–200 comments, reply threads visible
sample_row.buying_intent_signals: Posted about needing better systems for community engagement as product grows
sample_row.lead_temperature_reasoning: Active Instagram with high engagement and recent post about needing better systems
sample_row.autom8_angle: AI comment replies + DM flows to convert Instagram engagement into signups
sample_row.suggested_first_message_angle: Turning comment section into lead capture without manual work
sample_row.notes: Building in public audience strongly aligned with Autom8 use case
